title: Tsuwriy'el #6700
definition:
Zuriel = "my rock is God"

 1) son of Abihail and chief of the Merarite Levites at the time of
    the exodus
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zuriel = "my rock is God"

 1) son of Abihail and chief of the Merarite Levites at the time of
    the exodus

    NASB:  my rock is El, a Levite
